artifact_summary: Screenshot of a SCADA faceplate for Sump Pump No.1 from the Hazen SCADA Standards Appendix A, showing navigation icons and an empty alarm list.
artifact_blurb: A SCADA system interface screenshot illustrating the 'Sump Pump No.1' faceplate as defined in the Hazen SCADA Standards Appendix A. The view includes standard navigation controls and displays an empty alarm list, serving as a reference example for interface design compliance.
